name: asteria-workflow
description: Asteria 6A workflow hooks and local governance reminders for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Use Asteria-6A governance hooks for repo work.
interface.longDescription: Adds Codex lifecycle reminders for A1 Align, A2 Architect, A3 Act, A4 Assert, A5 Archive, and A6 Advance when working in H:\Asteria.
defaultPrompt: Follow Asteria-6A workflow and verify live governance authority before acting
